name: Yeti Ski
short_description: Old-school snow sports inspired by SkiFree. Have fun on the slopes, but watch out for the yeti!
detailed_description:
Inspired by SkiFree, Yeti Ski takes you back to the mountain for an authentic retro experience.

Enjoy all the original game modes, dodging obstacles and other skiers while catching air and pulling radical stunts.
Carve up powder as you zig-zag down the slalom course, or just chill out in freestyle mode.
Earn achievements and compete against other skiers to get the top position on the leaderboards.

Relive the classic SkiFree experience in the age of high-definition, with an eye-friendly color palette and atmospheric beats to complete the vibe.
Enjoy gamepad support and an intuitive control experience, playing on keyboard or gamepad.

But whatever you do, watch out for the Yeti!
It's back, and as mean as ever.
Will you escape the abominable monster, or meet your doom on the mountain?

Let's ski!
